scene_title: THUMB H — MULHER CHORANDO COM DNA

subject.primary: a Brazilian woman in her 40s, religious and devout looking, wearing dark clothes, face in profound anguished despair and crying — real tears streaming down her cheeks, red swollen eyes, expression of someone who has just received devastating news, hands raised slightly in gesture of disbelief, staring directly into the camera lens with raw desperate grief and terror
subject.secondary: surrounding her on BOTH SIDES: a spectacular golden glowing DNA double helix that spirals upward and outward from behind her, the helix pulses with divine light alternating between deep blood-red and brilliant gold — ancient Sumerian cuneiform symbols faintly visible within the helix strands. In the far background, barely visible: enormous ancient stone warrior hands with SIX FINGERS reaching down from darkness above
subject.focal_point: the woman's face — tear-streaked, red eyes, absolute despair expression
props: ash and ember particles falling like tears
ancient cuneiform symbols in the air

environment.location: abstract sacred dark space — a void between the ancient and the modern, suggesting both a cathedral and a laboratory simultaneously
environment.time_of_day: eternal darkness split by divine light
environment.atmosphere: sacred grief — the horror of discovering that God destroyed something He created, and humanity recreated it in 2018

composition.rule: woman face centered slightly RIGHT of center, DNA helix frames both sides, clean dark space on LEFT 30% for text overlay, 16:9 widescreen cinematic framing
composition.foreground: crying woman face — warm skin tones, glistening tears, swollen red eyes
composition.midground: glowing DNA double helix in blood-red and gold wrapping around the scene
composition.background: pure black with enormous six-fingered stone hands descending from top darkness, barely visible

lighting.key_light: golden divine light from directly above illuminating the woman's tear-streaked face and the DNA helix
lighting.fill_light: blood-red glow from the DNA helix reflecting on cheekbones and tears
lighting.rim_light: cold silver-white edge light from behind separating figure from black background
lighting.shadow_quality: Rembrandt lighting — deep dramatic shadows with golden teardrop highlights
lighting.mood: sacred horror and grief — beauty in the terrible truth

style.film_stock: Kodak Portra 800 pushed — rich warm skin tones, elevated grain, romantic yet horrifying
style.post_processing: hyper-detailed skin and tear texture, golden-red split tone color grade, macro-level detail on the tears on her face, cinematic depth
style.texture_detail: individual tears catching golden DNA light, red capillaries in eyes visible, skin pores, DNA strand molecular detail

mood.emotion: devastating sacred grief — a believer confronting the forbidden knowledge that God destroyed in the Flood

symbolism.primary: Genesis 6 — the Nephilim bloodline that God destroyed is now recreated by CRISPR in 2018 — the mourning of humanity facing this truth

negative_as_positive: clean surface without any visible text or watermarks
anonymous ordinary woman without celebrity recognition
hyper-detailed facial expression with authentic tears and red swollen eyes
naturalistic skin tones with dramatic golden-red accent lighting

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: YouTube thumbnail 16:9. The MAIN SUBJECT is a real-looking Brazilian woman in her 40s CRYING with absolute despair and grief — real tears on her face, red swollen eyes, desperate expression looking directly at camera. Surrounding her is a spectacular glowing DNA double helix in blood-red and gold light. In the distant background: enormous ancient SIX-FINGERED stone hands reaching down. LEFT 30% should be relatively clean dark space for text overlay. This is PHOTOREALISTIC portrait — maximum emotional intensity, authentic human grief. Every tear must be visible and catching the golden DNA light.
